roadmaps.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
roadmaps.description: Master the core DS&A concepts needed to ace FAANG interviews

nodes.title: Array Basics
nodes.description: Learn array creation, indexing, slicing, and common operations. Understand time complexities.

nodes.title: Two Pointers
nodes.description: Use two indices moving toward each other or in the same direction to solve problems in O(n).

nodes.title: Sliding Window
nodes.description: Maintain a window of elements that expands/shrinks. Great for substring and subarray problems.

nodes.title: Prefix Sum
nodes.description: Pre-compute cumulative sums for O(1) range queries instead of O(n) each time.

nodes.title: Singly Linked List
nodes.description: Nodes with value and next pointer. Understand traversal, insertion, deletion.

nodes.title: Doubly Linked List
nodes.description: Nodes with prev and next pointers. Used in LRU Cache and deque implementations.

nodes.title: Fast & Slow Pointers
nodes.description: Floyd's cycle detection. Fast pointer moves 2x speed. Used for cycle detection and finding midpoints.

nodes.title: Reverse a Linked List
nodes.description: Iterative and recursive approaches to reversing a singly linked list in-place.

nodes.title: Stack (LIFO)
nodes.description: Last In First Out. Used for DFS, undo operations, and balanced brackets problems.

nodes.title: Queue (FIFO)
nodes.description: First In First Out. Used for BFS, scheduling, and producer-consumer problems.

nodes.title: Monotonic Stack
nodes.description: Stack that maintains a monotonic order. Solves Next Greater Element and histogram problems.

nodes.title: Binary Trees
nodes.description: Tree where each node has at most 2 children. Learn traversals: inorder, preorder, postorder.

nodes.title: Binary Search Tree
nodes.description: BST property: left < node < right. Enables O(log n) search, insert, delete.

nodes.title: Depth-First Search
nodes.description: Explores as deep as possible before backtracking. Uses stack (iterative) or recursion.

nodes.title: Breadth-First Search
nodes.description: Explores level by level. Uses a queue. Perfect for shortest path in unweighted graphs.

nodes.title: Dijkstra's Algorithm
nodes.description: Finds shortest path in weighted graphs with non-negative edges using a priority queue.

nodes.title: 1D Dynamic Programming
nodes.description: Fibonacci, climbing stairs, house robber. Build solution from smaller subproblems.

nodes.title: 2D Dynamic Programming
nodes.description: Unique paths, edit distance, longest common subsequence using a 2D table.

nodes.title: 0/1 Knapsack
nodes.description: Classic DP: maximize value within weight constraint. Each item can only be used once.

nodes.title: Longest Common Subsequence
nodes.description: Find the longest sequence present in both strings. Foundation for edit distance.

nodes.title: Bubble / Selection / Insertion Sort
nodes.description: O(n^2) simple sorting algorithms. Important to understand fundamentals before advanced sorts.

nodes.title: Merge Sort
nodes.description: Divide and conquer O(n log n) sort. Stable, used for external sorting and linked lists.

nodes.title: Quick Sort
nodes.description: Partition-based O(n log n) average sort. In-place but unstable. Pivot selection matters.

nodes.title: Binary Search Variants
nodes.description: Search on answer, rotated arrays, first/last occurrence. O(log n) is the goal.

roadmaps.title: Frontend Development
roadmaps.description: Build modern, responsive web apps from HTML basics to React

nodes.title: HTML Basics & Semantics
nodes.description: Tags, attributes, semantic elements (header, main, section, article, footer). Document structure.

nodes.title: Forms & Inputs
nodes.description: Form elements, input types, validation attributes, accessibility with labels and ARIA.

nodes.title: Accessibility (a11y)
nodes.description: WCAG guidelines, ARIA roles, screen reader support, keyboard navigation.

nodes.title: CSS Fundamentals
nodes.description: Selectors, specificity, box model, colors, typography, and the cascade.

nodes.title: Flexbox
nodes.description: One-dimensional layout model. Master flex-direction, justify-content, align-items.

nodes.title: CSS Grid
nodes.description: Two-dimensional layout. Grid-template-columns, grid-template-rows, grid areas.

nodes.title: Responsive Design
nodes.description: Media queries, mobile-first approach, viewport units, responsive images.

nodes.title: JS Fundamentals
nodes.description: Variables (let/const/var), data types, operators, control flow, functions.

nodes.title: DOM Manipulation
nodes.description: querySelector, addEventListener, createElement, innerHTML, classList.

nodes.title: Async JS (Promises, async/await)
nodes.description: Event loop, callbacks, Promises, async/await, fetch API.

nodes.title: ES6+ Features
nodes.description: Arrow functions, destructuring, spread/rest, modules, template literals, optional chaining.

nodes.title: Closures & Scope
nodes.description: Lexical scope, closure, hoisting, IIFE patterns, this keyword.

nodes.title: React Fundamentals
nodes.description: JSX, components, props, state, and the virtual DOM. Create your first component.

nodes.title: Hooks (useState, useEffect)
nodes.description: State management with useState, side effects with useEffect, useRef, useCallback.

nodes.title: Context & State Management
nodes.description: Context API for global state, useReducer for complex state, intro to Zustand/Redux.

nodes.title: React Router
nodes.description: Client-side routing, Route, Link, useNavigate, useParams, nested routes.

nodes.title: TypeScript Basics
nodes.description: Static typing, interfaces, type aliases, union types, generics basics.

nodes.title: Advanced Types
nodes.description: Generics, utility types (Partial, Pick, Omit), conditional types, mapped types.

nodes.title: TypeScript with React
nodes.description: Typing props, events, hooks, and API responses in a React application.

nodes.title: Unit Testing with Jest
nodes.description: Write unit tests, use matchers, mock functions and modules.

nodes.title: React Testing Library
nodes.description: Test UI from the user's perspective. render, screen, userEvent, queries.

nodes.title: E2E Testing with Playwright
nodes.description: Browser automation for end-to-end testing across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit.

roadmaps.title: Backend Development
roadmaps.description: Build scalable REST APIs with Python, databases, and deployment

nodes.title: Python Core
nodes.description: Data types, control flow, functions, comprehensions, OOP, error handling.

nodes.title: Standard Library
nodes.description: collections, itertools, functools, pathlib, datetime, json modules.

nodes.title: Package Management
nodes.description: pip, virtual environments (venv), requirements.txt, pyproject.toml.

nodes.title: HTTP & REST Principles
nodes.description: HTTP methods, status codes, headers, REST constraints, CRUD operations.

nodes.title: Flask Framework
nodes.description: Routes, blueprints, request/response, middleware, Jinja2 templates.

nodes.title: FastAPI
nodes.description: Async Python API framework with automatic OpenAPI docs, Pydantic validation.

nodes.title: API Security
nodes.description: JWT authentication, OAuth2, rate limiting, CORS, input validation.

nodes.title: SQL Fundamentals
nodes.description: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, JOINs, GROUP BY, indexes.

nodes.title: PostgreSQL
nodes.description: Production-grade RDBMS. Advanced queries, CTEs, window functions, JSON support.

nodes.title: ORMs (SQLAlchemy)
nodes.description: Map Python classes to database tables. Sessions, relationships, migrations with Alembic.

nodes.title: NoSQL (MongoDB / Redis)
nodes.description: Document databases with MongoDB, in-memory cache/message broker with Redis.

nodes.title: Sessions & Cookies
nodes.description: Stateful auth with server-side sessions, cookie security flags (HTTPOnly, Secure, SameSite).

nodes.title: JWT Authentication
nodes.description: Stateless auth with JSON Web Tokens. Access & refresh token pattern.

nodes.title: OAuth2 & Social Login
nodes.description: Delegate authentication to Google, GitHub, etc. Authorization code flow.

nodes.title: Docker Basics
nodes.description: Dockerfile, images, containers, volumes, docker-compose for multi-service apps.

nodes.title: CI/CD Pipelines
nodes.description: GitHub Actions for automated testing and deployment. Build, test, deploy on push.

nodes.title: Cloud Deployment (AWS/GCP)
nodes.description: Deploy to EC2/Cloud Run, configure environment variables, SSL with Let's Encrypt.

roadmaps.title: System Design
roadmaps.description: Design large-scale distributed systems for senior engineering interviews

nodes.title: Scalability
nodes.description: Vertical vs horizontal scaling, stateless services, session management at scale.

nodes.title: Load Balancing
nodes.description: Round-robin, least connections, consistent hashing. Layer 4 vs Layer 7 load balancers.

nodes.title: Caching
nodes.description: Cache-aside, write-through, write-back patterns. CDN, Redis, Memcached. Eviction policies.

nodes.title: Database Sharding
nodes.description: Horizontal partitioning across multiple DB instances. Range, hash, directory-based sharding.

nodes.title: Replication
nodes.description: Primary-replica setup for read scaling and fault tolerance. Synchronous vs async replication.

nodes.title: CAP Theorem
nodes.description: A distributed system can guarantee at most 2 of: Consistency, Availability, Partition tolerance.

nodes.title: Design URL Shortener
nodes.description: Base62 encoding, redirect flow, analytics, rate limiting, DB schema for billions of URLs.

nodes.title: Design Twitter
nodes.description: Feed generation (push vs pull), fanout on write vs read, celebrity problem, media storage.

nodes.title: Design Netflix
nodes.description: CDN for video streaming, adaptive bitrate, content recommendation, microservices architecture.

nodes.title: Design WhatsApp
nodes.description: Message delivery guarantees, WebSockets for real-time, end-to-end encryption, presence system.

nodes.title: Microservices vs Monolith
nodes.description: Trade-offs of microservices: deployment complexity vs independent scaling and deployment.

nodes.title: API Gateway & Service Mesh
nodes.description: Single entry point for clients. Handles auth, rate limiting, routing. Istio, Kong.

nodes.title: Message Queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ)
nodes.description: Async communication between services, event-driven architecture, guaranteed delivery.
